## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Smith.ai and GrowthX to discuss website updates and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Referral page needs updates to focus on AI receptionist while balancing messaging for existing virtual receptionist clients](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Partner page requires significant revisions to better showcase tools, benefits, and demo capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Homepage components and messaging should be leveraged for consistency across other pages](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [New managing editor Jo Kaminska joining next week, bringing strong SEO and content strategy expertise](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

## Topics

### Referral Page Updates

  - [Pro referral page needs copy changes and AI integration](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Remove mentions of chat and outbound calling services](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Emphasize white-glove approach and done-for-you services](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Incorporate homepage components for consistency (e.g., "expert onboarding" section)](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Simplify signup process by embedding Calendly directly on the page](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

### Partner Page Revisions

  - [Current partner page needs significant updates](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Include demo of partner tools and account access (similar to Novatic demo on AI receptionist page)](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Highlight partner benefits and impact on clients](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Address different partner models (reselling, referring, controlling)](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
  - [Incorporate FAQ section and update questions if needed](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on two main products: AI receptionist and virtual receptionist](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Remove mentions of outbound calling and chat services from most pages](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Maintain consistency with homepage messaging and design](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Experiment with LLMS.txt files for SEO purposes](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Plan for monthly SEO and backlink performance updates](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

### Team Updates

  - [Jo Kaminska joining as new managing editor next week](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Jo has strong background in SEO and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Will be overseeing Smith.ai account and others](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create mock-up of revised partner page layout](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Review and potentially update Smith.ai's LLMS.txt file](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Implement referral page updates, including embedding Calendly](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Continue updating industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Prepare for company type pages as next priority](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [Schedule monthly SEO and backlink performance updates with Jo Kaminska](https://fathom.video/share/EMSVGGVb76ED1HW2SMZkxgxMm9HcK7Lp?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
